name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_acceptance_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeAcceptanceGate aggregates transient cruise skew wake result seeds and error budget groups into a lab validation acceptance decision.
note: Primary lab acceptance gate for transient cruise skew wake evidence.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_result_seed
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeResultSeed supplies per target pressure velocity arrival time and momentum pass fail seeds.
note: Per target validation seed input.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_error_budget
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeErrorBudget supplies preset plane sweep group candidate diagnostics.
note: Group level diagnostic input.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_validation_run_matrix
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeValidationRunMatrix supplies live run availability and evidence slots for those seeds.
note: Execution status input.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_readiness_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeReadinessGate blocks transient validation before source skew probe and transient support are ready.
note: Readiness gate input.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_temporal_resolution
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeTemporalResolution supplies sample period requirements behind arrival time evidence.
note: Temporal evidence constraint.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future live transient powered cruise skew wake validation.
note: Upstream CFD target for live evidence.
